title: Function Types, Parameters, Overloads, and Callable APIs · Contract Lens: Void Unknown Errors
summary: Refactor status calculations and adapters into callable contracts that preserve inputs, failures, and return relationships. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts void unknown errors increment in a callable service transformation toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent callbacks, thrown failures, and unknown catch values without pretending exceptions appear in return types.
Write visible overload signatures with one compatible implementation and prefer unions when return relationships do not vary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
